channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump targets Rep. Thomas Massie, urging Kentucky voters to oust him in Tuesday primary
item.description: Trump cites Sen. Bill Cassidy's defeat in Louisiana as a warning to Rep. Thomas Massie ahead of Kentucky's Republican primary.

item.title: Trump calls for Massie's primary defeat, says 'get this loser out'
Sen. Graham urges Trump to resume U.S. strikes on Iran
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., called on President Trump to renew military strikes on Iran, citing a stalled ceasefire.

item.title: Trump warns Iran: 'clock is ticking' to act fast or face destruction
item.description: President Trump warns Iran on Truth Social that time is running out as he considers resuming military action.
